prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约26469→28787→31686→36142→33342，整体呈后移趋势，2024年达到最高点36142后2025年小幅回升至33342，近5年累计后移约 6873名，波动幅度较大；该校在广东省物理类招生计划持续扩增：2021年31人、2022年34人、2023年34人、2024年38人、2025年43人，2026年进一步扩至50人，较2025年增加7人（+16.3%），扩招幅度显著，将直接拉低竞争门槛，使最低录取位次后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉:
中国矿业大学（北京）为211工程、双一流建设 高校，软科中国大学排名2026年第76名，近年排名稳定在69–77名区间，属中上游211层次，对考生有稳定吸引力；2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，学校管理回应 正常；2022年曾有一次师德师风类偏负面事件，但距今较远影响有限；抖音热度未进入全国前100名，短视频曝光一般，未见明显报考热度异常信号；无投档断档历史记录。
5. 【优势学科】学科评估数据中未收录该校具体评级，但该校以矿业工程、安全科学与工程为传统优势方向，相关专业在行业内认可度高，对目标明确的考生有吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气工程及其自动化、电子信息/通信等工科专业社会热度持续偏高，该校相关专业招生竞争力较强；广东省2026年物理类考生约456,000人，较2025年44 0,208人增加约15,792人（+3.6%），考生规模扩大加剧整体竞争。；该校位于北京市，对广东省考生属于跨省报考，无本省招生倾 斜。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次33342、2026年招生计划大幅扩招16.3%、广东省物理类考生增加3 .6%带来的额外竞争压力，以及学校声誉平稳、专业热度分化等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次将较2025年明显后移。预测最低位次约36799名，区间36299–37299名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间36299–37299名内，建议以二档专业为主攻方向、一档专业作为冲刺、三档专业作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如低于36299名）可重点冲刺计算机科学与技 术、电气工程及其自动化等热门专业；位次接近区间上限（如37299名附近）建议优先考虑三档专业以确保录取。该校为211层次，整体性价比较高，扩招后录取机会增加。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 26469 → 28787 → 31686 → 36142 → 33342, showing an overall backward trend, reaching a peak of 36142 in 2024 before slightly recovering to 33342 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 6873 positions over the past 5 years and significant fluctuations; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Guangdong Province has been continuously expanding: 31 in 2021, 34 in 2022, 34 in 2023, 38 in 2024, 43 in 2025, and further expanding to 50 in 2026, an increase of 7 students (+16.3%) compared to 2025, a significant expansion that will directly lower the competition threshold and push the minimum admission ranking backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: China University of Mining and Technology (Beijing) is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university, ranked 76th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in the 69–77 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities, maintaining stable appeal to candidates; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with normal university management response; there was one negative incident related to teacher ethics in 2022, but it is relatively distant and has limited impact; Douyin popularity did not enter the national top 100, with average short video exposure, showing no obvious abnormal signals in application popularity; no history of enrollment gaps. 5. [Advantage Disciplines] The specific ratings of the university's disciplines are not included in the discipline evaluation data, but the university's traditional strengths are in Mining Engineering and Safety Science and Engineering, with related majors highly recognized in the industry, attracting candidates with clear goals.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity for engineering majors such as Computer Science and Technology, Electrical Engineering and Automation, and Electronic Information/Communication remains high, and the university's related majors have strong competitiveness in admissions; the number of Physics Category candidates in Guangdong Province in 2026 is approximately 456,000, an increase of about 15,792 (+3.6%) compared to 440,208 in 2025, with the expansion of the candidate pool intensifying overall competition; the university is located in Beijing, which is an inter-provincial application for Guangdong candidates, with no local admission preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 33342, the significant 16.3% expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan, the additional competitive pressure from a 3.6% increase in Guangdong Physics Category candidates, and factors such as stable university reputation and differentiated major popularity, the minimum admission ranking in 2026 is expected to shift significantly backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 36799, with a range of 36299–37299.

- Artificial Intelligence.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

- Intelligent Mining Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 36299–37299, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., below 36299), prioritize competitive majors such as Computer Science and Technology and Electrical Engineering and Automation; if the ranking is near the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 37299), it is advisable to prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission. The university is a 211-level institution with overall high cost-effectiveness, and admission opportunities increase after the expansion.
